name: Binary Ninja MCP
author: fosdick.io
description: A Binary Ninja plugin that provides a local HTTP server and CLI for LLM-assisted binary analysis.
longdescription:
# Binary Ninja MCP

This repository contains a Binary Ninja plugin and CLI that enable local automation of Binary Ninja analysis workflows.

![Binary Analysis Report Generation](images/mcp-demo-report.png)

## Features

- Local HTTP API exposed by Binary Ninja
- Terminal CLI for analysis, navigation, logging, and UI operations
- Multi-instance discovery across local Binary Ninja plugin servers

## Components

1. A Binary Ninja plugin that exposes Binary Ninja capabilities through HTTP endpoints.
2. A `binja-cli` terminal client that discovers local plugin servers and calls those endpoints.

## Installation / Usage

For information on installation and usage, please see https://github.com/fosdickio/binary_ninja_mcp.
